free_text: Elastic and Inelastic Scattering of 30 and 50 MeV
Polarized and Unpolarized Beams of Protons by Ar-40
The Gas Target was Mounted on a Target Wheel at the
Centre of the Scattering Chamber. The Gas Target
Consisted of a 5 cm Diameter Dural Cylinder with
Windows. The Windows Consisted of 2 Mum Havar Foil For
The Cross Section Measurements and 8 Mum Foil For the
The Scattered Particle were Detected in the
Focal Plane of the Spectrometer Using an Acoustic Spark
